summary: Completed frontend testing of Slot Booking Control feature. All 9 requested features tested and verified working correctly. Empty slots show 'Click to book' text with + icon. Book Slot modal opens with time, date, outlet info, customer name input, vehicle number input, and service dropdown. Service selection shows price and duration. Manage Booking modal opens for booked slots with existing booking details and status update buttons (Pending, In Progress, Completed, Cancelled). Status updates persist correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: SlotBookingModal.js correctly implements two modes: 'add' for empty slots and 'manage' for booked slots
Service dropdown properly filters active services with services.filter(s => s.active)
Status buttons use proper color coding: blue for Pending, yellow for In Progress, green for Completed, red for Cancelled
Modal correctly displays service details (name, duration, price) after selection
data-testid attributes properly implemented on slots (e.g., slot-800, slot-1000)

success_rate.backend: N/A - Backend testing skipped as requested

seed_data_creation: Created test booking: Customer 'Test Customer ABC', Vehicle 'TN99TEST123', Service 'Premium Wash', Time '10:00', Status updated to 'In Progress'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Slot Booking Control feature fully tested. Book Slot modal and Manage Booking modal both working correctly. Status updates persist to database. 122 total bookings in system.

slot_manager_page_loads.details: Page loads with clickable slots, outlet selector, date navigation

empty_slots_display.details: Empty slots show 'Click to book' text and + icon

book_slot_modal_opens.details: Clicking empty slot opens 'Book Slot' modal

book_slot_modal_fields.details: Modal shows time (8:00), date (Sat, Jan 17), outlet info (Ri'Drippin Bengaluru #2), customer name input, vehicle number input, service dropdown

service_selection_details.details: Selecting service shows price (₹399) and duration (30 minutes) in highlighted section

manage_booking_modal_opens.details: Clicking booked slot opens 'Manage Booking' modal with existing booking details

manage_booking_modal_details.details: Shows customer name, vehicle number, service name, price, and current status

status_buttons.details: All 4 status buttons (Pending, In Progress, Completed, Cancelled) visible and selectable

cancel_and_action_buttons.details: Cancel button closes modal, Book Slot/Update Status buttons work correctly
